description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Ezboxx Portal System Beta 0.7.6 and earlier allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via (1) the pic parameter to custom/piczoom.asp, (2) the nocatname parameter to boxx/user-upload.asp, or (3) the iid parameter to indexes/newscomments.asp.
